reason: Astronauts confront cascading failures in space and must jury-rig solutions to return home.
Submarine officers locked underwater debate launch orders to avert nuclear disaster.
Twelve jurors locked in a room debate a verdict, unraveling doubt through heated discussion.
Bus passengers and driver must outwit a terrorist’s bomb by keeping speed above 50 mph.
Passengers and crew stranded at 30,000 ft must solve mechanical chaos to land safely.
One cop in a skyscraper must outthink terrorists to free hostages and regain control.
A wife and detective navigate a single house to expose a clever murder plot.
A team trapped in an underwater station encounters a mysterious sphere that demands logic to escape.
A cook on a battleship uses wit and grit to thwart terrorists holding the ship hostage.
An ex-soldier on a hijacked train must outsmart criminals to save passengers.
